name: sherweb-mcp
description: Every Sherweb Partner API capability, plus a local SQLite store, offline analytics, and margin/drift/orphan joins no other Sherweb tool has.

sherweb_client_id.title: SHERWEB_CLIENT_ID
sherweb_client_id.description: Sets SHERWEB_CLIENT_ID for the Sherweb MCP server.

sherweb_client_secret.title: SHERWEB_CLIENT_SECRET
sherweb_client_secret.description: Sets SHERWEB_CLIENT_SECRET for the Sherweb MCP server.

sherweb_oauth_scope.title: SHERWEB_OAUTH_SCOPE
sherweb_oauth_scope.description: Sets SHERWEB_OAUTH_SCOPE for the Sherweb MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

sherweb_subscription_key.title: SHERWEB_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY
sherweb_subscription_key.description: APIM gateway subscription key from cumulus.sherweb.com Security > APIs.
